reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout with a custom bitmap text system for HUD labels, floor numbers, timer digits, and scale angle readouts.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_art_deco_numeric_font_16px_ascii_48glyph.png through AssetServer during UI bootstrap and register glyph rectangles in a bitmap font resource.
runtime_notes: Atlas covers digits, uppercase letters needed for FLOOR, HP, EXPOSURE, L, R, DEG, and punctuation used by timers.
Glyphs snap to whole pixels in Bevy UI space to avoid shimmer at the target 60 FPS presentation.
Text color tinting can reuse gold, white, teal, and amber from the core palette without repainting the atlas.

context.usage: Bitmap font atlas for floor labels, timers, scale readouts, rank letters, and small stock counters across the HUD.

shape.silhouette: 16 px tall geometric bitmap glyphs with stepped corners, narrow counters, and bold vertical stems suited for art deco UI framing.

specs.texture: Solid fills with no anti aliasing and slightly heavier vertical stems than horizontal bars.
specs.shading: Flat one tone glyphs with optional engine tinting at runtime.

acceptance_criteria: Font atlas is exactly 128x96 px with forty eight 16x16 glyph cells in an 8 by 6 grid.
Digits 0 through 9, uppercase letters needed for HUD labels, colon, slash, period, and degree marker are all present.
All glyph strokes align to whole pixels and use only listed colors plus transparency.
